prompt_text: Write a recommendation letter for Mei who is applying to a design program. Mention creativity and iteration based feedback.
response_text:
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Institution]
[Date]

[Recipient's Name]
[Recipient's Title]
[Design Program Name]
[Program Address]

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I am writing to wholeheartedly recommend Mei for admission to your esteemed design program. As Mei's mentor and instructor in [Your Course/Program], I have had the pleasure of witnessing her growth and development as a designer, and I can confidently attest to her exceptional creativity, dedication, and passion for design.

Mei's creative approach to problem-solving is truly impressive. She has a unique ability to think outside the box and bring innovative ideas to the table. Her designs are not only aesthetically pleasing but also functional and user-centered. Throughout her time in our program, Mei has consistently demonstrated a willingness to take risks and push the boundaries of what is possible.

One of Mei's greatest strengths is her ability to receive and incorporate feedback. She is an exemplary student who values iteration and refinement as essential components of the design process. Mei is not afraid to challenge her own ideas and is open to constructive criticism, which allows her to refine her designs and create something truly exceptional. Her ability to iterate based on feedback has resulted in some of her most impressive work, and I have no doubt that she will continue to excel in this area as she progresses in her design career.

Mei's technical skills are also impressive, and she has a solid understanding of design principles, software, and tools. Her proficiency in [specific software or tools] has allowed her to create high-quality designs that are both visually appealing and effective.

What sets Mei apart, however, is her passion for design and her commitment to using her skills to make a positive impact. She is driven by a desire to create meaningful and engaging experiences for users, and her enthusiasm is contagious. Mei is an exceptional team player who is always willing to collaborate and support her peers.

In my opinion, Mei would be an excellent fit for your design program. Her creativity, dedication, and passion for design make her an ideal candidate, and I have no doubt that she will excel in your program. I strongly recommend Mei for admission and am confident that she will make valuable contributions to your community.

If you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to contact me. I would be more than happy to provide any additional information.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Institution]
